title: In der Türkei wird die Kunst zur Waffe

en: In Turkey, art becomes a weapon. Fighter planes thunder over the Bosphorus, artists take to the barricades, a three-legged cat demonstrates against Erdogan's regime of terror. One work in particular for the Biennale in Istanbul leaves even hardened critics speechless.
la: In Turcia ars telum fit. Plana in Bosphoro pugnator intonant, artifices ad munimenta capiunt, tripes cattus contra Erdogani regimen terroris demonstrat. Unum opus notabile pro Biennale in Istanbul foliis etiam obduratis criticis mutus est.

de: INTERVIEW - «Es geht nicht ohne Kernkraft», sagt Bundesrat Albert Rösti zur drohenden Stromlücke. Der Strombedarf wächst, doch der Ausbau der erneuerbaren Energien lahmt. Deutlich wie nie zuvor macht der SVP-Bundesrat im Interview klar, warum für ihn kein Weg an einem neuen Atomkraftwerk vorbeiführt.
en: INTERVIEW - “It doesn’t work without nuclear power,” says Federal Councilor Albert Rösti about the looming electricity shortage. The demand for electricity is growing, but the expansion of renewable energies is sluggish. In the interview, the SVP Federal Councilor makes it clearer than ever before why, for him, there is no way around a new nuclear power plant.
la: CONLOQUIUM - "sine potestate nuclei non operatur", Albert Rösti Consiliarius Foederalis de electricitatis instat inopia. Postulatio electricitatis crescit, dilatatio autem virium renovationum pigra est. In colloquio, SVP Consiliarius Foederalis clarius facit quam umquam ante quam ob causam, quia eo modo circa novam herbam nuclei non est.

de: Gefahr auf Rügen, Usedom, Hiddensee - Regen und Frost lassen Steilküsten bröckeln. Regen und Frost machen Steilufer brüchig. Minister warnt vor gefährlichen Erdrutschen an Rügen, Usedom und Hiddensee.
en: Danger on Rügen, Usedom, Hiddensee - rain and frost cause cliffs to crumble. Rain and frost make steep banks brittle. Minister warns of dangerous landslides on Rügen, Usedom and Hiddensee.
la: Pericula in Rügen, Usedom, Hiddensee — Imbres et pruinae causa rupes fatiscit. Imbribus et gelidis ripis fragilia reddunt ardua. Minister admonet de periculosis prolapsionibus in Rügen, Usedom et Hiddensee.
